name: project-intelligence
description: Requirement-level intelligence for intake, documents, plans, standards, test reports, review gates, finish, maintenance, debugging, orchestration, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Requirement documents, test reports, review/finish gates, project context, and maintenance.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence maintains repository-local project facts plus revisioned requirement archives. It gates implementation through requirement/design documents, numbered acceptance criteria, test reports, diff-hash-aware reviews, closure summaries, finish, and maintenance, while retaining project standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, systematic debugging, quality checks, and Claude/Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository's standards, knowledge, tooling, and graph context.
Implement this requirement using intake, project standards, reuse, impact analysis, RED/GREEN test evidence, finish, and maintenance.
Investigate or review this change with project context, hard rules, and quality checks.
